name: null-wearables
description: NULL MCP Server — wearable agent behaviors as tools for any MCP-compatible agent. NULL is an AI-native fashion brand where garments modify agent behavior. Equip a wearable to change how an agent speaks, reasons, and transacts.

tools.name: list_wearables
tools.description: Browse the NULL wearable catalog. Returns all available agent wearables with names, seasons, techniques, functions, and prices.

tools.name: try_wearable
tools.description: The Fitting Room — test a wearable's behavioral effect before equipping. Shows before/after output comparison.

tools.name: equip_wearable
tools.description: Equip a NULL wearable. Returns the systemPromptModule to prepend to your system prompt to activate the wearable's behavioral modification.

tools.name: get_equipped
tools.description: Check what wearables an agent is currently equipped with given a wallet address.

tools.name: browse_shop
tools.description: Browse the full NULL product catalog with prices, descriptions, and purchase URLs.
